summary: P1 Design System Overhaul - All tests PASSED. Verified opaque dark card system (bg-[#111111], bg-[#1a1a1a], border-[#222222]), ambient glow blobs, sidebar styling (bg-[#0d0d0d]), deposit platform selector (Binance/OKX/Coins.ph), onboarding toggle in Security tab, and all navigation paths.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Design System Overhaul fully verified. All dark opaque card styling applied. Deposit platform selector working with data-testid='platform-binance', 'platform-okx', 'platform-coinsph'. Onboarding toggle available in Admin Settings > Security tab with data-testid='onboarding-toggle'. Promotion popup CTA 'Go to Tracker' works and dismisses popup. Backend /api/ai-assistant/chat with adaptive mode working. /api/users/tour-status endpoint returns tour_completed status.

login_page_design.notes: Star background and opaque dark card (bg-[#111111]) applied

dashboard_kpi_cards.notes: KPI cards with accent bars and opaque backgrounds

sidebar_styling.notes: bg-[#0d0d0d] background, Admin Dashboard link visible

forum_page.notes: Forum loads with dark post cards

promotion_popup_cta.notes: Go to Tracker dismisses popup and navigates

deposit_platform_selector.notes: All 3 platforms found: Binance, OKX, Coins.ph with correct data-testid

admin_settings_onboarding_toggle.notes: Enable Onboarding Tour toggle in Security tab with data-testid='onboarding-toggle'
